item.title: Walmart's feature-packed $160 smartwatch is on sale for 85% off
item.description: "The touchscreen is large, bright, and easy to navigate."

item.title: Walmart is selling an 'easy and functional' 2-drawer side table for just $20
item.description: This small side table is great for the bedroom or TV room.

item.title: Wayfair is selling a $789 vintage-style mid-century modern sofa for $210
item.description: "Just the right balance of style and comfort."

item.title: Walmart is selling an 18-pack of drawer organizers for just $20 during a Flash deal
item.description: "It saves so much time in the mornings and makes the drawers look neat and tidy."

item.title: Another troubled theme park files for Chapter 11 bankruptcy
item.description: With consumer sentiment ebbing throughout 2025, many Americans have spent the last year watching their discretionary spending more carefully — an econ...
